inputs.sql: SELECT trial_name, drug FROM trials WHERE superiority = 1 LIMIT 3
SELECT trial_name, drug, primary_result FROM trials WHERE superiority = 1 LIMIT 4
SELECT trial_name, drug, primary_result FROM trials WHERE superiority = 1 LIMIT 3

SELECT trial_name, drug, indication, population, n_total, duration_years, primary_endpoint, primary_result, primary_p_value, cv_death_rr, hf_hospitalisation_rr, publication_year, journal FROM trials WHERE drug = 'semaglutide' AND indication LIKE '%type 2 diabetes%' ORDER BY publication_year DESC

SELECT t.trial_name, t.drug, se.event_type, se.drug_arm_pct, se.placebo_arm_pct, se.relative_risk, se.severity FROM trials t JOIN safety_events se ON t.id = se.trial_id WHERE t.drug = 'semaglutide' AND t.indication LIKE '%type 2 diabetes%' ORDER BY t.trial_name
SELECT DISTINCT drug FROM trials LIMIT 20
SELECT trial_name, drug, indication FROM trials LIMIT 20
SELECT * FROM trials WHERE drug LIKE '%semaglutide%' AND (indication LIKE '%T2DM%' OR indication LIKE '%diabetes%')

SELECT t.id, t.trial_name, t.drug, se.event_type, se.drug_arm_pct, se.placebo_arm_pct, se.relative_risk, se.severity, se.notes FROM trials t LEFT JOIN safety_events se ON t.id = se.trial_id WHERE t.drug LIKE '%semaglutide%' AND (t.indication LIKE '%T2DM%' OR t.indication LIKE '%diabetes%' OR t.indication LIKE '%HFpEF%' OR t.indication LIKE '%CKD%')
SELECT * FROM trials WHERE drug = 'semaglutide' AND indication = 'type 2 diabetes'
SELECT trials.*, safety_events.* FROM trials LEFT JOIN safety_events ON trials.id = safety_events.trial_id WHERE trials.drug = 'semaglutide' AND trials.indication = 'type 2 diabetes'
SELECT * FROM trials WHERE drug LIKE '%semaglutide%' OR drug LIKE '%Semaglutide%'
SELECT * FROM trials WHERE trial_name LIKE '%SUSTAIN%'
SELECT * FROM trials WHERE drug = 'semaglutide' AND indication = 'type 2 diabetes'
SELECT * FROM trials WHERE drug = 'semaglutide'
SELECT * FROM safety_events WHERE trial_id IN (SELECT id FROM trials WHERE drug = 'semaglutide')

SELECT trial_name, drug, population, n_total, duration_years, primary_endpoint, primary_result, primary_p_value, cv_death_rr, hf_hospitalisation_rr, renal_outcome_rr, hba1c_reduction, weight_reduction_kg, publication_year, journal FROM trials WHERE drug LIKE '%semaglutide%' OR drug = 'Semaglutide' ORDER BY publication_year DESC

SELECT t.trial_name, t.drug, se.event_type, se.drug_arm_pct, se.placebo_arm_pct, se.relative_risk, se.severity FROM trials t JOIN safety_events se ON t.id = se.trial_id WHERE t.drug LIKE '%semaglutide%' ORDER BY t.trial_name, se.event_type
SELECT trial_name, drug, n_total, pancreatitis_events FROM trials WHERE drug LIKE '%semaglutide%' AND pancreatitis_events IS NOT NULL
SELECT * FROM trials WHERE drug = 'semaglutide' AND indication = 'type 2 diabetes'
SELECT * FROM trials WHERE drug LIKE '%semaglutide%'
SELECT * FROM trials WHERE drug_class = 'GLP-1 receptor agonist' ORDER BY publication_year DESC
SELECT t.trial_name, t.drug, t.indication, t.cv_death_rr, t.hf_hospitalisation_rr, t.renal_outcome_rr FROM trials t WHERE t.indication = 'type 2 diabetes' ORDER BY t.publication_year DESC

SELECT se.event_type, se.drug_arm_pct, se.placebo_arm_pct, se.relative_risk, se.severity FROM safety_events se JOIN trials t ON se.trial_id = t.id WHERE t.drug LIKE '%semaglutide%' AND t.indication LIKE '%diabetes%'
SELECT * FROM safety_events WHERE trial_id IN (SELECT id FROM trials WHERE drug LIKE '%semaglutide%')
SELECT * FROM trials WHERE drug LIKE '%semaglutide%' OR drug LIKE '%Semaglutide%'
SELECT * FROM safety_events WHERE trial_id IN (1, 2, 4)
SELECT trial_name, drug, cv_death_rr, primary_result FROM trials WHERE drug LIKE '%semaglutide%' AND indication LIKE '%T2DM%'

SELECT trial_name, drug, indication, population, n_total, duration_years, primary_endpoint, primary_result, primary_p_value, cv_death_rr, hf_hospitalisation_rr, publication_year FROM trials WHERE drug LIKE '%semaglutide%' AND indication LIKE '%type 2%'

SELECT t.trial_name, se.event_type, se.drug_arm_pct, se.placebo_arm_pct, se.relative_risk, se.severity FROM safety_events se JOIN trials t ON se.trial_id = t.id WHERE t.drug LIKE '%semaglutide%' AND t.indication LIKE '%type 2%'
SELECT * FROM trials WHERE drug LIKE '%semaglutide%'

SELECT t.trial_name, se.event_type, se.drug_arm_pct, se.placebo_arm_pct, se.relative_risk, se.severity, se.notes FROM safety_events se JOIN trials t ON se.trial_id = t.id WHERE t.drug LIKE '%semaglutide%' AND (t.indication LIKE '%T2DM%' OR t.indication LIKE '%type 2%')
SELECT * FROM safety_events WHERE trial_id IN (1, 4, 8)
SELECT * FROM trials WHERE drug LIKE '%semaglutide%' OR trial_name LIKE '%SUSTAIN%' OR trial_name LIKE '%SELECT%' OR trial_name LIKE '%FLOW%'
SELECT se.*, t.trial_name, t.drug FROM safety_events se JOIN trials t ON se.trial_id = t.id WHERE t.drug LIKE '%semaglutide%' OR t.trial_name LIKE '%SUSTAIN%' OR t.trial_name LIKE '%SELECT%'

SELECT t.trial_name, t.drug, t.n_total, t.duration_years, t.primary_endpoint, t.primary_result, t.primary_p_value, t.superiority, t.hba1c_reduction, t.weight_reduction_kg, t.cv_death_rr, t.publication_year FROM trials WHERE drug LIKE '%semaglutide%' ORDER BY publication_year

SELECT trial_name, drug, n_total, duration_years, primary_result, primary_p_value, superiority, hba1c_reduction, weight_reduction_kg, cv_death_rr, publication_year FROM trials WHERE drug LIKE '%semaglutide%' ORDER BY publication_year

SELECT t.trial_id, t.trial_name, t.drug, t.condition, t.phase, t.num_participants, t.year
        FROM trials t
        WHERE LOWER(t.drug) LIKE '%semaglutide%'
           OR LOWER(t.trial_name) LIKE '%semaglutide%'
        ORDER BY t.year DESC

SELECT * FROM trials
        WHERE LOWER(drug) LIKE '%semaglutide%'
        ORDER BY publication_year DESC

SELECT se.*, t.trial_name, t.drug, t.indication
        FROM safety_events se
        JOIN trials t ON se.trial_id = t.id
        WHERE LOWER(t.drug) LIKE '%semaglutide%'
        ORDER BY t.trial_name, se.event_type

SELECT trial_name, drug, indication, n_total, duration_years,
               primary_endpoint, primary_result, primary_p_value, superiority,
               hba1c_reduction, weight_reduction_kg, cv_death_rr, hf_hospitalisation_rr,
               renal_outcome_rr, publication_year, journal, doi
        FROM trials
        WHERE LOWER(drug) LIKE '%semaglutide%'
          AND (LOWER(indication) LIKE '%t2dm%' OR LOWER(indication) LIKE '%cv%')
        ORDER BY publication_year ASC
SELECT * FROM trials WHERE drug LIKE '%semaglutide%' OR trial_name LIKE '%SUSTAIN%' OR trial_name LIKE '%SELECT%' OR trial_name LIKE '%FLOW%'
SELECT se.*, t.trial_name, t.drug FROM safety_events se JOIN trials t ON se.trial_id = t.id WHERE t.drug LIKE '%semaglutide%' ORDER BY t.trial_name, se.event_type

SELECT trial_name, drug, n_total, duration_years, primary_result, primary_p_value, superiority, hba1c_reduction, weight_reduction_kg, cv_death_rr, publication_year FROM trials WHERE drug LIKE '%semaglutide%' ORDER BY publication_year
